label: North Woodwatch

intent.role: A small northern woodcutting watch post that gives the northwest frontier a real structure anchor.
intent.differenceFromStarterTown: Sparse, practical, and tree-line focused instead of cozy or civic.
intent.playerRead: A quiet timber checkpoint where roads, yew trees, and northern travel start to feel occupied.

npcPlan.role: northwest road guide and yew frontier flavor

promotionChecklist: Keep this outpost small so the northwest remains wild.
Use existing frontier cottage and bunkhouse stamps rather than making a bespoke forester building.
Check yew frontier nodes and bank services before promotion.
Promote the road as DIRT tile metadata, not preview geometry.
